frames.setting: Large open white-walled event or rehearsal space with white folding chairs arranged in a circle or rows; participants wear name badge lanyards; diverse group of people seated, standing, and speaking; one frame shows a woman at a podium or standing in front of a whiteboard/screen
visual_elements: White-walled open loft or studio space
Large group listening session or workshop setup
One woman speaking from a standing position on camera (interview-style, lighter background)
frames.presentation_style: Town hall or listening session documentary; multi-person, multi-angle coverage; observational style with no text overlays

frames.setting: Same open white loft space; participants seated in folding chairs; candidate now present, writing in a notebook at a desk; close-up of candidate's face in one frame
visual_elements: Candidate in dark suit, seated, writing notes
Attendees with name badges including a person in a keffiyeh
Black curtain visible in background of some frames
Close-up of candidate's focused, attentive expression
Another individual in a beige suit also taking notes
frames.presentation_style: Close observation of the candidate actively listening and documenting; emphasis on attentiveness; no graphic elements or text

frames.setting: Same space; final frames show candidate reviewing printed materials (appears to be letters or testimonies); closing frame shows campaign logo on black background
visual_elements: Candidate in suit reading printed documents
A red rose on the desk next to the candidate
Campaign brand card: 'a NEW ERA for NYC' in stylized font on black
Multiple close-up angles of the candidate reading
frames.presentation_style: Closes with campaign branding; overall video documents the 'Mayor is listening' concept through a structured community session; candidate shown as engaged and note-taking throughout

summary.dominant_setting: Large open white studio or loft space configured as a community listening session with folding chairs
text_overlay_types: Campaign slogan outro card ('a NEW ERA for NYC')
visual_themes: Candidate as active listener and note-taker
Name badges and organized civic engagement
